title: WOBSION Travel Makeup Mirror with Light, Dimmable Compact Mirror for Pocket, Small Mirrors for Handbag, 1x/3x Magnifying Portable Led Mirrors for Women, Rechargeable, Gifts for Girls, Black
features: 1X/3X Magnifying Mirror with Light: Double-sided mirror design, 1X mirror equipped with 8 daylight LEDs, It can show your face more clearly, even in dim environment. 3X magnification is great for close up detail work such as applying eye makeup
Touch Dimming: Single click the touch button to adjust the light color(3000 K/4000 K/6000 K), long press the touch button to adjust the light brightness

Magnetic Switch and Memory Function: Intimate magnetic switch design, very easy to open and won’t hurt your nails. The next time you use it the brightness and colour temperature will be the same as the last time you used it.

Rechargeable Travel Mirrors: 8.5 cm long, 6.4 cm wide and 1.6 cm thick, almost the same size as a bank card, easy to carry. Type-C charge, 400 mAh capacity battery, only takes 1-2 hours to fully charge, long lasting
Awesome Gift: We choose beautiful packaging, It is excellent makeup gift, for makeup lovers, Valentine's Day, Christmas, useful and adorable
